commands: az storage account create --resource-group rg-contractforge-stream-test --name cffabricf11obj65687 --location brazilsouth --sku Standard_LRS --kind StorageV2 --allow-blob-public-access true --https-only true --min-tls-version TLS1_2
az storage container create --account-name cffabricf11obj65687 --name cf-fabric-f11 --public-access blob --auth-mode login
az storage blob upload --account-name cffabricf11obj65687 --container-name cf-fabric-f11 --name object-storage/orders.csv --file .tmp/fabric_object_orders.csv --overwrite true --auth-mode key

contract_source.basis: Contract-only Azure Blob source-expansion project generated by the Fabric adapter

known_limitations: This smoke validates Azure Blob CSV through a public blob and Fabric Spark wasbs runtime path; direct private Blob is covered by docs/reports/fabric-private-azure-blob-source-smoke.json, external Azure Blob shortcuts are covered by docs/reports/fabric-external-azure-blob-shortcut-source-smoke.json, external ADLS Gen2 shortcuts are covered by docs/reports/fabric-adls-shortcut-source-smoke.json, external Google Cloud Storage shortcuts are covered by docs/reports/fabric-gcs-shortcut-source-smoke.json, external Amazon S3 shortcuts are covered by docs/reports/fabric-external-s3-shortcut-source-smoke.json, external S3-compatible shortcuts are covered by docs/reports/fabric-s3-compatible-shortcut-source-smoke.json, Amazon S3 Iceberg table shortcuts are covered by docs/reports/fabric-iceberg-table-shortcut-source-smoke.json, ADLS Gen2 Iceberg table shortcuts are covered by docs/reports/fabric-adls-iceberg-table-shortcut-source-smoke.json and Google Cloud Storage Iceberg table shortcuts are covered by docs/reports/fabric-gcs-iceberg-table-shortcut-source-smoke.json. ADLS managed identity/OAuth credentials, private-network shortcut variants, Delta Sharing and direct-catalog Iceberg variants remain separate review gates.
The storage account is a tiny test fixture, not a production security model.
